fixture spirit-reactive-large
identity example:spirit-reactive-large 0.1.0
imports
  none
resolved_imports
  none
macro_trace
  applied RootInput -> SchemaEnumVariants -> RootOutput -> SchemaEnumVariants -> RootNamespace -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> Vec -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaEnumDefinition -> SchemaEnumVariants -> SchemaEnumDefinition -> SchemaEnumVariants -> SchemaEnumDefinition -> SchemaEnumVariants -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> Vec -> Option -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> Vec -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> Vec -> KeyValue -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields
  positions RootInput -> EnumVariants -> RootOutput -> EnumVariants -> RootNamespace -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> TypeReference -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> EnumVariants -> NamespaceDeclaration -> EnumVariants -> NamespaceDeclaration -> EnumVariants -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> TypeReference -> TypeReference -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> TypeReference -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> TypeReference -> TypeReference -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields
input Input
  Record(Entry)
  Correct(Correction)
  Observe(Query)
  Watch(WatchRequest)
  Unwatch(SubscriptionToken)
  Reindex
  Compact
output Output
  Recorded(RecordReceipt)
  Corrected(CorrectionReceipt)
  Observed(RecordSet)
  Watching(SubscriptionReceipt)
  Unwatched(SubscriptionReceipt)
  Rejected(Rejection)
  Indexed(IndexReceipt)
namespace
  newtype Topic = Text
  newtype Topics = Vec<Topic>
  newtype Description = Text
  newtype AgentName = Text
  newtype Timestamp = Integer
  newtype RecordIdentifier = Integer
  newtype SubscriptionToken = Integer
  newtype CommitSequence = Integer
  newtype DatabaseDigest = Integer
  enum Magnitude
    Minimum
    VeryLow
    Low
    Medium
    High
    VeryHigh
    Maximum
  enum Kind
    Decision
    Principle
    Correction
    Clarification
    Constraint
    Observation
    Question
  enum RejectionReason
    Malformed
    Unauthorized
    Conflict
    Unsupported
    StaleVersion
  struct Entry
    topics: Topics
    kind: Kind
    description: Description
    magnitude: Magnitude
    agent_name: AgentName
    timestamp: Timestamp
  struct Correction
    record_identifier: RecordIdentifier
    description: Description
    magnitude: Magnitude
    agent_name: AgentName
    timestamp: Timestamp
  struct Query
    topics: Topics
    kinds: Vec<Kind>
    limit: Option<Integer>
  struct WatchRequest
    topics: Topics
    kinds: Vec<Kind>
    agent_name: AgentName
  struct RecordReceipt
    record_identifier: RecordIdentifier
    commit_sequence: CommitSequence
    database_digest: DatabaseDigest
  struct CorrectionReceipt
    record_identifier: RecordIdentifier
    commit_sequence: CommitSequence
    database_digest: DatabaseDigest
  struct RecordSet
    records: Vec<Entry>
    by_topic: KeyValue<Topic, RecordIdentifier>
  struct SubscriptionReceipt
    subscription_token: SubscriptionToken
    commit_sequence: CommitSequence
  struct Rejection
    rejection_reason: RejectionReason
    description: Description
  struct IndexReceipt
    commit_sequence: CommitSequence
    database_digest: DatabaseDigest
